title: Weak--strong uniqueness for bi-fluid compressible system with algebraic closure
summary: We consider a real two-fluid system of compressible viscous fluids with a common velocity field and algebraic closure for the pressure law. The constitutive relation involves densities of both fluids through an implicit function. The existence of global-in-time finite energy weak solutions to this system is known since the work of Novotný and Pokorný [Arch. Rational Mech. Anal., 2020]. On the other hand, existence of local-in-time strong solutions is due to Piasecki and Zatorska [J. Math Fluid Mech.,, 2022]. In this paper, we establish the weak--strong uniqueness principle using the relative entropy method. In sharp contrast to the two-phase model of Baer-Nunziato type, the volume fraction of phase $+$ obeys a transport equation with an additional nonlinear term. This gives rise to troublesome terms in the relative entropy inequality. We are able to close the estimate by making an elaborate use of the structure of the system.

AI.tldr: 建立了双流体可压缩粘性流体系统的弱-强唯一性原理
AI.motivation: 研究具有共同速度场和代数压力闭合的双流体可压缩粘性系统，该系统已知存在全局有限能量弱解和局部强解，但弱解与强解之间的关系尚未明确
AI.techniques: 相对熵方法，利用系统结构的精细分析处理相体积分数输运方程中的非线性项
AI.main_theorems: 建立了该双流体系统的弱-强唯一性原理：如果存在强解，则任何具有相同初始条件的弱解在强解存在的时间内必须与强解一致
AI.significance: 为双流体模型提供了数学严谨性，证明了弱解在强解存在时的唯一性，与Baer-Nunziato型两相模型形成鲜明对比，展示了相对熵方法在复杂流体系统中的应用

title: The lingering phenomenon and pattern formation in a nonlocal population model with cognitive map
summary:
The rates at which individuals memorize and forget environmental information strongly influence their movement paths and long-term space use. To understand how these cognitive time scales shape population-level patterns, we propose and analyze a nonlocal population model with a cognitive map. The population density moves by a Fokker--Planck type diffusion driven by a cognitive map that stores a habitat quality information nonlocally. The map is updated through local presence with learning and forgetting rates, and we consider both truncated and normalized perception kernels.
  We first study the movement-only system without growth. We show that finite perceptual range generates spatial heterogeneity in the cognitive map even in nearly homogeneous habitats, and we prove a lingering phenomenon on unimodal landscapes: for the fixed high learning rate, the peak density near the best location is maximized at an intermediate forgetting rate.
  We then couple cognitive diffusion to logistic growth. We establish local well-posedness and persistence by proving instability of the extinction equilibrium and the existence of a positive steady state, with uniqueness under an explicit condition on the motility function. Numerical simulations show that lingering persists under logistic growth and reveal a trade-off between the lingering and total population size, since near the strongest-lingering regime the total mass can fall below the total resource, in contrast to classical random diffusive--logistic models.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一个带有认知地图的非局部种群模型，揭示了记忆和遗忘时间尺度如何影响种群运动模式和空间分布。
AI.motivation: 研究个体记忆和遗忘环境信息的时间尺度如何影响其运动路径和长期空间利用，从而理解认知过程如何塑造种群层面的空间分布模式。
AI.techniques: 使用Fokker-Planck型扩散方程描述种群运动，引入认知地图存储非局部栖息地质量信息，结合截断和归一化感知核，分析无增长系统和带逻辑增长的系统。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 有限感知范围在近乎均匀栖息地中产生认知地图的空间异质性；2) 在单峰景观中证明滞留现象：固定高学习率时，最佳位置附近的峰值密度在中等遗忘率时最大；3) 建立局部适定性、灭绝平衡的不稳定性以及正稳态解的存在性。
AI.significance: 将认知过程整合到种群动力学模型中，揭示了认知时间尺度对空间分布的关键影响，发现了滞留现象与总种群规模之间的权衡，为理解动物空间行为提供了新的理论框架。

title: Quantitative Landis-type result for Dirac operators
summary: We study quantitative unique continuation at infinity for Dirac equations with bounded matrix-valued potentials. For the massless Dirac operator $\mathcal{D}_n$ in $\mathbb{R}^n$, we establish a Landis-type estimate showing that the vanishing order of any nontrivial bounded solution of $( \mathcal{D}_n + \mathbb{V} ) \varphi = 0$ satisfies a lower bound of order $\exp(-κR^{2} (\log R)^{2})$ as $|x|=R\to \infty$; the quadratic growth in the exponent is sharp, in view of previous known results. Our proof follows a Bourgain--Kenig type approach based on a Carleman inequality for Dirac operators which relies on a local Hölder regularity result, which we also prove. In two dimension, we obtain improved quantitative estimates under symmetry assumptions on the potential $\mathbb{V}$ and for real-valued solutions. Finally, we also derive qualitative Landis-type results for Dirac equations with decaying potentials, including critical decay rates.

AI.tldr: 建立了Dirac方程在无穷远处的定量唯一延拓性质，给出了Landis型估计，证明了解在无穷远处的衰减下界为exp(-κR²(logR)²)。
AI.motivation: 研究Dirac方程在无穷远处的定量唯一延拓性质，这是椭圆型方程唯一延拓理论的重要问题。Dirac算子作为量子力学中的基本算子，其唯一延拓性质对理解解的渐近行为具有重要意义。
AI.techniques: 采用Bourgain-Kenig方法，基于Dirac算子的Carleman不等式，结合局部Hölder正则性结果。在二维情况下，利用势能的对称性假设和实值解的性质获得改进估计。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对无质量Dirac算子D_n，证明了Landis型估计：任何非平凡有界解在无穷远处的消失阶至少为exp(-κR²(logR)²)；2. 在二维情况下，在势能对称性和实值解假设下获得改进的定量估计；3. 推导了具有衰减势能的Dirac方程的定性Landis型结果。
AI.significance: 该结果建立了Dirac方程在无穷远处定量唯一延拓的精确估计，指数中的二次增长是最优的。为Dirac方程解的渐近行为提供了精确刻画，对量子力学中的散射理论和反问题有重要应用价值。

title: An intrinsic expansion approach to the Galerkin approximations for the Navier-Stokes equations
comment: with an appendix by Chengzhang Fu. submitted for publication. 29 pages
summary: We study the Galerkin approximation of the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations. In particular, we examine the convergence of these solutions in a sequence of finite dimensional spaces as the dimension goes to infinity. For any sequence of steady state or, respectively, time dependent Galerkin solutions that converges to a solution of the Navier-Stokes equations, we obtain a subsequence with an intrinsic asymptotic expansion in appropriate nested function spaces. Consequently, an induced asymptotic expansion is obtained in a more standard spatial Sobolev or, respectively, spatiotemporal Sobolev-Lebesgue space. In the case of steady states, we establish certain relations among leading terms of this expansion.

AI.tldr: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程Galerkin近似的渐近展开及其收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程Galerkin近似解在有限维空间维数趋于无穷时的收敛性，特别是当Galerkin解序列收敛到Navier-Stokes方程解时的渐近行为
AI.techniques: Galerkin逼近方法、渐近展开分析、嵌套函数空间理论、Sobolev空间和Sobolev-Lebesgue空间理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于收敛到Navier-Stokes方程解的Galerkin解序列，存在子序列在适当嵌套函数空间中具有内在渐近展开；2. 在更标准的空间Sobolev或时空Sobolev-Lebesgue空间中得到诱导渐近展开；3. 对于稳态情形，建立了展开式中主导项之间的特定关系
AI.significance: 为Navier-Stokes方程数值近似的收敛性分析提供了新的理论框架，深化了对Galerkin方法渐近行为的理解，对计算流体力学中的误差分析和数值方法设计有重要意义

title: The nonlinear Schrödinger equation with combined nonlinearities in 1D
summary:
We consider the one-dimensional nonlinear Schrödinger equation $$ iu_t + u_{xx} + \mathcal{N}(u)u=0, \quad x,t \in \mathbb R, $$ with the nonlinearity term that is expressed as a sum of powers, possibly infinite: $$ \mathcal{N}(u) = \sum d_k |u|^{α_k}, \quad α_k > 0. $$
  We first investigate the local well-posedness of this equation for any positive powers of $α_k$ in a certain weighted class of initial data, subset of $H^1 (\mathbb R)$. For that we use an approach of Cazenave-Naumkin [19], thus, avoiding any Strichartz estimates. Then, using the pseudo-conformal transformation, we extend the local result to the global one for the initial data with a quadratic phase. Furthermore, we investigate the asymptotic behavior of such global solutions and prove scattering for data with the quadratic phase $e^{ib|x|^2}$ with sufficiently large positive $b$, in $H^1(\mathbb R)$. One of the advantages of considering an infinite sum in the nonlinearity term is being able to consider exponential nonlinearities, such as $e^{γ|u|^{k}} u$, as well as sine or cosine nonlinearities, and obtain well-posedness in those cases, the first such result for most of those nonlinearities.
  To conclude, we show numerical simulations for various examples of combined nonlinearities, including the double nonlinearity and an exponential one, then investigate the behavior of solutions with positive or negative initial $b$ in a quadratic phase data. Furthermore, we also show that a ground state in the NLS equation with combined nonlinearities no longer provides a sharp threshold for global behavior such as scattering vs. finite time blow-up, instead the equation has a much richer dynamics.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究具有无限和形式非线性项的一维非线性薛定谔方程，建立了局部适定性、全局适定性及散射理论，并首次处理了指数型非线性等特殊情形。
AI.motivation: 研究具有无限和形式非线性项的一维非线性薛定谔方程，旨在统一处理包括幂次非线性、指数非线性（如e^{γ|u|^k}u）、正弦/余弦非线性等多种非线性类型，这些非线性在物理应用中具有重要意义但缺乏系统的适定性理论。
AI.techniques: 采用Cazenave-Naumkin方法避免使用Strichartz估计；利用伪共形变换将局部结果扩展到全局；对具有二次相位的数据建立散射理论；数值模拟研究不同非线性组合的动力学行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在加权初始数据类中建立局部适定性（对所有正幂次α_k）；2. 对具有二次相位的初始数据证明全局适定性；3. 对充分大正b的二次相位数据证明散射；4. 首次获得指数非线性等特殊情形的适定性结果。
AI.significance: 首次系统处理无限和非线性项，统一了多种非线性类型的研究框架；揭示了组合非线性下基态解不再提供散射与爆破的尖锐阈值，展现了更丰富的动力学行为；为指数非线性等特殊情形提供了首个适定性理论。

title: Global dynamic stability of contact lines in fluids: 2-D droplet problem
summary: In this paper, we investigate the dynamics of an incompressible viscous Navier-Stokes fluid evolving above a one-dimensional flat surface. The fluid is subject to a uniform gravitational field and capillary forces acting along the free boundary. The interface between the fluid and the surrounding air is a free surface whose motion is driven by gravity, surface tension, and the fluid velocity field. The triple-phase intersections where the fluid, the air above the vessel, and the solid vessel wall meet are referred to as contact points, and the angles formed there are called contact angles. The model under consideration incorporates boundary conditions that allow for full motion of the contact points and dynamic contact angles. Under these conditions, \cite{Yang} established the existence of equilibrium configurations for the model. These equilibria consist of a quiescent fluid occupying a domain whose upper boundary can be represented as the graph of a function in polar coordinates, minimizing a gravity-capillary energy functional subject to a fixed mass constraint. The equilibrium contact angles may take any value in $(0,π)$ depending on the choice of capillary parameters. In the present work, we develop a framework of a priori estimates for this model. We prove that, for initial data sufficiently close to equilibrium, the system admits global solutions that converge exponentially fast to a (horizontally) shifted equilibrium state.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维重力-毛细管自由边界Navier-Stokes系统在接触点完全运动条件下的全局存在性与指数稳定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究二维不可压缩粘性Navier-Stokes流体在重力场和毛细管力作用下的自由边界问题，特别关注接触点完全运动条件下的动力学行为，扩展Yang关于平衡构型存在性的工作
AI.techniques: 先验估计框架、能量方法、线性化分析、接触点运动处理、自由边界正则性估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在初始数据充分接近平衡态时，系统存在全局解且以指数速率收敛到（水平平移后的）平衡态
AI.significance: 为具有完全运动接触点和动态接触角的自由边界Navier-Stokes系统建立了稳定性理论，深化了对重力-毛细管流体界面动力学的理解

title: Concentration Phenomena for $(p,N)$-Laplace Equation Under Discontinuous Nonlinearities and Penalization Method
summary: In this paper, we investigate the existence and concentration of solutions to a $(p,N)$-Laplace equation in $\mathbb{R}^N$ involving a discontinuous nonlinearity and critical exponential growth. To establish the existence of solutions, we employ a penalization technique in the sense of Del Pino and Felmer adapted to a locally Lipschitz functional. Furthermore, by combining variational methods with Moser-type iteration techniques, we obtain the concentration behavior of the solutions. Our results contribute to the study of nonlinear elliptic problems with irregular nonlinearities and critical growth phenomena.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有间断非线性和临界指数增长的(p,N)-Laplace方程解的存在性和集中性
AI.motivation: 研究具有不规则非线性项和临界增长现象的非线性椭圆问题，特别是(p,N)-Laplace方程在临界指数增长和间断非线性条件下的解的性质
AI.techniques: 采用Del Pino和Felmer的惩罚技术，适用于局部Lipschitz泛函；结合变分方法和Moser型迭代技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了(p,N)-Laplace方程在临界指数增长和间断非线性条件下解的存在性定理，并获得了解的集中行为结果
AI.significance: 扩展了不规则非线性项和临界增长椭圆问题的研究，为处理间断非线性提供了新的技术框架，对非线性偏微分方程理论有重要贡献

title: Existence and nonexistence of normalized solutions for nonlinear Schrödinger equation involving combined nonlinearities in bounded domain
summary: In this paper, we consider the existence, multiplicity and nonexistence of solutions for the following equation \begin{equation*} \begin{cases} \begin{aligned} &-Δu+ωu=μu^{p-1}+u^{q-1},~ u>0 \quad &&\text { in } Ω, \\ &u=0 &&\text { on } \partialΩ, \\ \end{aligned} \end{cases} \end{equation*} with prescribed $L^2$-norm $\|u\|_2^2=ρ$, where $N\ge 1$, $ρ>0$, $μ\in \mathbb{R}$, $1<p\le q$, and $Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^N$ is a bounded smooth domain. The parameter $ω\in\mathbb{R}$ arises as a Lagrange multiplier. Firstly, when $2<p\le q\le \frac{2N}{(N-2)^+}$ and $ρ$ is small, we establish the existence of a local minimizer of energy. Furthermore, when $μ\ge 0$ and $Ω$ is a star-shaped domain, using the monotonicity trick and the Pohozaev identity, we show that there exists a second solution which is of mountain pass type. Secondly, when $μ\ge 0$, $N\ge 3$, $1<p\le 2$, $q\ge \max\left\{\frac{2N}{N-2}, 3\right\}$ and $Ω$ is a convex domain, using the moving-plane method, we prove the nonexistence of normalized solutions for large $ρ$. Finally, when $μ=0$, $N\ge 3$, $q=\frac{2N}{N-2}$ and $Ω$ is a ball, we give a dichotomy result of normalized solutions for the Brézis-Nirenberg problem by continuation arguments.

AI.tldr: 研究带有L²范数约束的椭圆型方程解的存在性、多重性和不存在性
AI.motivation: 研究带有L²范数约束的椭圆型方程（归一化解）的存在性、多重性和不存在性问题，这类问题在数学物理中具有重要意义，特别是与非线性薛定谔方程相关的基态解和激发态解。
AI.techniques: 变分法、单调性技巧、Pohozaev恒等式、移动平面法、延拓论证
AI.main_theorems: 1. 小范数下存在局部极小能量解；2. 星形区域中存在山路型第二解；3. 大范数下凸区域中不存在归一化解；4. Brézis-Nirenberg问题的二分性结果
AI.significance: 系统研究了带有L²约束的椭圆方程解的存在性理论，发展了归一化解的完整理论框架，为非线性薛定谔方程的基态解研究提供了重要工具。

title: Critical thresholds for semilinear damped wave equations with Riesz potential power nonlinearity and initial data in pseudo-measure spaces
summary: In this paper, our primary objective is to establish the time decay properties of solutions $u(t, x)$ with initial data $u_0, u_1 \in \mathcal{Y}^q$ (pseudo-measure spaces) to the linear damped wave equation in the spaces $L^2\left(\mathbb{R}^n\right)$ and $\dot{H}^s\left(\mathbb{R}^n\right)$ (for $s \leq 0$ or $s \geq 0$). Our subsequent aim is to investigate the semilinear damped wave equation with a Riesz potential-type power nonlinearity $\mathcal{I}_γ\left(|u|^p\right)$, where $γ\in [0, n)$, and initial data belonging to pseudo-measure spaces $\mathcal{Y}^q$. In addition, we derive a new critical exponent $p=p_{\mathrm{crit}}(n, q, γ):=1+\frac{2+γ}{n-q}$ for some $q \in\left(0, \frac{n}{2}\right)$ and in low spatial dimensions, within the framework of pseudo-measure spaces $\mathcal{Y}^q$. Specifically, we prove the global (in time) existence of small-data Sobolev solutions with low regularity when $p \geq p_{\mathrm{crit}}(n, q, γ)$, and the finite-time blow-up of weak solutions, even for small initial data, whenever $1< p<p_{\mathrm{crit}}(n, q, γ)$. Moreover, in order to characterize the blow-up time more precisely, we establish sharp upper and lower bound estimates for the lifespan of solutions in the subcritical regime.

AI.tldr: 建立了带Riesz势型非线性项的阻尼波方程在伪测度空间中解的时间衰减性质，并推导了新的临界指数。
AI.motivation: 研究阻尼波方程在伪测度空间中的解行为，特别是带Riesz势型非线性项$\mathcal{I}_γ(|u|^p)$的方程，旨在理解解的时间衰减、全局存在性和爆破现象。
AI.techniques: 使用伪测度空间$\mathcal{Y}^q$框架，分析线性阻尼波方程的时间衰减估计，结合Riesz势型非线性项的处理方法，通过能量估计和爆破分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 线性阻尼波方程在$L^2$和$\dot{H}^s$空间中的时间衰减估计；2) 推导新的临界指数$p_{\mathrm{crit}}(n,q,γ)=1+\frac{2+γ}{n-q}$；3) 当$p≥p_{\mathrm{crit}}$时小初值Sobolev解的全局存在性；4) 当$1<p<p_{\mathrm{crit}}$时弱解的有限时间爆破；5) 爆破时间的上下界估计。
AI.significance: 扩展了阻尼波方程在伪测度空间中的理论，为带Riesz势型非线性项的波方程提供了新的临界指数框架，对理解此类非线性发展方程的解行为有重要意义。

title: Large-Time Asymptotics for Heat and Fractional Heat Equations on the Lattice and General Finite Subgraphs
summary:
In this paper, we study large-time asymptotics for heat and fractional heat equations in two discrete settings: the full lattice \(\mathbb Z^d\) and finite connected subgraphs with Dirichlet boundary condition. These results provide a unified discrete theory of long-time asymptotics for local and nonlocal diffusions.
  For \(d\ge1\) and \(s\in(0,1]\), we consider on \(\mathbb Z^d\) the Cauchy problem \[ \partial_t u+(-Δ)^s u=0,\qquad u(0)=u_0\in \ell^1(\mathbb Z^d), \] and derive a precise first-order asymptotic expansion toward the lattice fractional heat kernel \(G_t^{(s)}\). The main technical input is a pair of sharp translation-increment bounds for \(G_t^{(s)}\): a pointwise estimate and an \(\ell^1\)-estimate. As consequences, under finite first moment we obtain the optimal decay rate \(t^{-1/(2s)}\) in \(\ell^p\)-asymptotics (\(1\le p\le\infty\)), and we prove sharpness by explicit shifted-kernel examples. Without moment assumptions, we still establish convergence in the full \(\ell^1\)-class, and we show that no universal quantitative rate can hold in general.
  We also analyze fractional Dirichlet diffusion on finite connected subgraphs (restricted fractional setting, including \(s=1\) as the local case). In this finite-dimensional framework, solutions admit spectral decomposition and exhibit exponential large-time behavior governed by the principal eigenvalue and the spectral gap. In addition, we study positivity improving properties of the associated semigroups for both the lattice and Dirichlet evolutions.

AI.tldr: 建立了离散格点与有限子图上分数热方程长时间渐近行为的统一理论
AI.motivation: 研究离散格点ℤ^d和有限连通子图上分数热方程的长时间渐近行为，建立局部与非局部扩散的统一离散理论
AI.techniques: 使用分数热核的平移增量估计（点态估计和ℓ^1估计），谱分解方法，以及构造显式移位核反例
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在ℤ^d上得到向分数热核的一阶渐近展开；2. 在有限一阶矩下获得ℓ^p渐近的最优衰减率t^{-1/(2s)}；3. 无矩假设下证明全ℓ^1类的收敛性；4. 有限子图上建立指数衰减的谱行为
AI.significance: 为离散格点和有限图上的分数扩散方程提供了统一的长时间渐近理论框架，填补了连续与离散理论之间的空白

title: Heat Equation driven by mixed local-nonlocal operators with non-regular space-dependent coefficients
summary: In this paper, we study the Cauchy problem for a heat equation governed by a mixed local--nonlocal diffusion operator with spatially irregular coefficients. We first establish classical well-posedness in an energy framework for bounded, measurable coefficients that satisfy uniform positivity, and we derive an a priori estimate ensuring uniqueness and continuous dependence on the initial data. We then extend the notion of solution to distributional coefficients and initial data by a Friedrichs-type regularisation procedure. Within this very weak framework, we establish the existence and uniqueness of solution nets and prove consistency with the classical weak solution whenever the coefficients are regular.

AI.tldr: 研究具有空间不规则系数的混合局部-非局部扩散算子的热方程柯西问题，建立了经典适定性和非常弱解框架
AI.motivation: 研究具有空间不规则系数的混合局部-非局部扩散算子的热方程柯西问题，这类算子结合了局部和非局部扩散机制，系数具有空间不规则性，需要建立适定性理论
AI.techniques: 能量框架方法、Friedrichs型正则化程序、先验估计、非常弱解框架、解网理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对有界可测系数建立经典适定性；2. 推导确保唯一性和对初值连续依赖性的先验估计；3. 通过正则化将解概念扩展到分布系数和初值；4. 在非常弱框架下建立解网的存在唯一性；5. 证明与经典弱解的一致性
AI.significance: 为具有不规则系数的混合扩散算子建立了系统的适定性理论，扩展了经典解框架，为处理更一般的系数提供了数学工具，在非局部扩散方程理论中有重要应用价值

title: Global Gevrey Hypoellipticity of Involutive Systems on Non-Compact Manifolds
summary: We investigate the global Gevrey hypoellipticity of a class of first-order differential operators associated with tube-type involutive structures on $M\times\mathbb{T}^m$, where $M$ is a non-compact manifold diffeomorphic to the interior of a compact manifold with boundary and $\mathbb{T}^m$ is the $m$-dimensional torus. For $s>1$, we work in Gevrey classes of Roumieu and Beurling type. A key step is the construction, on $M$, of a scattering metric whose coefficients are Gevrey of order $s$ in every analytic chart; this allows us to use Hodge theory and obtain Gevrey regularity for the harmonic forms. Under a natural condition on the defining closed $1$-forms, we obtain a sharp criterion for global Gevrey hypoellipticity in terms of rationality and (Roumieu/Beurling) exponential Liouville behavior.

AI.tldr: 研究在M×𝕋^m上的一类一阶微分算子的全局Gevrey亚椭圆性，建立了基于有理性和指数Liouville行为的尖锐判据。
AI.motivation: 研究非紧流形M（带边紧流形内部）与环面𝕋^m乘积上的管型对合结构相关的一阶微分算子的全局Gevrey亚椭圆性，这是经典亚椭圆性理论在Gevrey光滑性框架下的推广。
AI.techniques: 构造M上的散射度量（系数在解析坐标卡中为s阶Gevrey），利用Hodge理论获得调和形式的Gevrey正则性，结合有理性和指数Liouville行为分析。
AI.main_theorems: 在定义闭1-形式的自然条件下，建立了全局Gevrey亚椭圆性的尖锐判据：取决于有理性和(Roumieu/Beurling型)指数Liouville行为。
AI.significance: 将亚椭圆性理论扩展到Gevrey光滑性框架，为管型对合结构提供了新的正则性判据，发展了散射几何与Gevrey分析的联系。

title: A remark on staircase laminates in restricted sets
summary: We slightly extend the convex integration via staircase laminate toolbox recently developed by Kleiner, Müller, Székelyhidi, and Xie. As an example we revisit the proof by Astala-Faraco-Székelyhidi on optimal Meyers' regularity theory via this framework.

AI.tldr: 扩展了凸积分方法中的阶梯层状结构工具箱，并重新审视了Meyers正则性理论的最优结果证明
AI.motivation: 凸积分方法在偏微分方程理论中用于构造反例和病态解，Kleiner等人最近发展了基于阶梯层状结构的工具箱，本文旨在进一步扩展这一框架
AI.techniques: 凸积分方法、阶梯层状结构（staircase laminate）、变分原理、正则性理论分析
AI.main_theorems: 扩展了凸积分的阶梯层状结构工具箱，重新证明了Astala-Faraco-Székelyhidi关于Meyers正则性理论的最优结果
AI.significance: 为凸积分方法提供了更强大的工具，深化了对椭圆方程正则性理论的理解，展示了凸积分框架在分析最优正则性界限中的应用价值

title: Multiscale Hyperbolic-Parabolic Models for Nonlinear Reactive Transport in Heterogeneously Fractured Porous Media
summary: We study nonlinear reactive transport in a layered porous medium separated by an $\varepsilon$-thin, highly heterogeneous fracture whose aperture and obstacle pattern vary periodically. Species transport in the bulk is governed by parabolic reaction--diffusion equations, coupled to a convection-diffusion-reaction problem in the fracture with nonlinear wall and obstacle reactions and Peclet number of order $O(\varepsilon^{-1})$. Via multiscale analysis as $\varepsilon \to 0$, when the fracture collapses to a flat interface, we derive a new type of homogenized model consisting of bulk diffusion--reaction equations coupled through nonlinear interface conditions and a first-order semilinear hyperbolic system on the interface. We prove well-posedness and regularity of the limit system, construct a multiscale approximation with boundary-layer correctors, and derive quantitative error estimates in suitable energy norms.

AI.tldr: 通过多尺度分析推导出非线性反应-输运问题的均匀化模型，包含界面上的半线性双曲系统耦合
AI.motivation: 研究分层多孔介质中由ε-薄、高度异质裂缝分隔的非线性反应输运问题，裂缝孔径和障碍物模式周期性变化，当裂缝坍缩为平坦界面时，需要建立有效的均匀化模型
AI.techniques: 多尺度渐近分析、边界层修正子构造、能量范数误差估计、非线性反应-扩散-对流方程的均匀化方法
AI.main_theorems: 推导出新型均匀化模型：体扩散-反应方程通过非线性界面条件耦合，界面上包含一阶半线性双曲系统；证明极限系统的适定性和正则性；构造带边界层修正的多尺度近似；推导能量范数下的定量误差估计
AI.significance: 为高度异质裂缝中的非线性反应输运问题提供严格数学框架，发展了多尺度界面耦合问题的分析方法，在地下水污染、石油工程等领域有重要应用

title: On the uniqueness and structural stability of Couette-Poiseuille flow in a channel for arbitrary values of the flux
summary: We establish uniqueness and structural stability of a class of parallel flows in a 2D straight, infinite channel, under perturbations with either globally or locally bounded Dirichlet integrals. The significant feature of our result is that it does not require any restriction on the size of the flux characterizing the flow. Precisely, by extending and refining an approach initially introduced by J.B. McLeod, we demonstrate the continuous invertibility of the linearized operator at a generic Couette-Poiseuille solution that does not exhibit flow reversal. We then deduce local uniqueness of these solutions as well as their nonlinear structural stability under small external forces. Moreover, we prove the uniqueness of certain class of Couette-Poiseuille solutions ``in the large," within the set of solutions possessing natural symmetry. Finally, we bring an example showing that, in general, if the flow reversal assumption is violated, the linearized operator is no longer invertible.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维无限直通道中一类平行流的唯一性和结构稳定性，无需对流量大小施加限制
AI.motivation: 研究二维无限直通道中平行流的稳定性问题，特别是Couette-Poiseuille解的稳定性和唯一性，解决传统方法中需要限制流量大小的问题
AI.techniques: 扩展和改进了J.B. McLeod的方法，证明了线性化算子在无回流假设下的连续可逆性，利用非线性结构稳定性理论
AI.main_theorems: 1. 无回流Couette-Poiseuille解的线性化算子连续可逆性；2. 解的局部唯一性和非线性结构稳定性；3. 具有自然对称性的解在"大范围"内的唯一性；4. 反例：当回流假设被违反时线性化算子不可逆
AI.significance: 突破了传统稳定性理论中对流量大小的限制，为平行流稳定性分析提供了更一般的理论框架，在流体力学稳定性理论中具有重要意义

title: Regularity and Pathwise bounds for probabilistic solutions of PDEs
summary: In this paper, we build a procedure that allows to establish regularity and controls in time for probabilistic solutions to PDEs. Probabilistic approaches to global wellposedness problems usually provide ensemble bounds on the solutions. These bounds are the main tools to ensure convergence procedures yielding the existence and uniqueness of global solutions. A question of interest consists in transforming such ensemble bounds into individual controls on the flow ; this, among other uses, gives valuable information on the long-time behavior of the solutions. Toward such question of bounds transformation, Bourgain initiated a successful procedure that exploited the local wellposedness of the PDE, with an estimate of the time of size-doubling. In this note, we construct an estimation procedure which relies on a different local requirement. It turns out that this substitute is flexible enough to be possible to fulfill with the help of the ensemble bound itself. For applications of the procedure, we are able to provide new pathwise controls on solutions to NLS equations.

AI.tldr: 构建了一个将概率解的系综估计转化为个体路径控制的新程序
AI.motivation: 概率方法通常提供解的系综估计，但需要将这些系综估计转化为个体路径控制，以获得解的长时间行为等有价值信息
AI.techniques: 构建了基于不同局部要求的估计程序，该程序足够灵活，可以利用系综估计本身来满足局部要求
AI.main_theorems: 建立了将概率解的系综估计转化为个体路径控制的新程序，并应用于NLS方程获得新的路径控制结果
AI.significance: 为研究概率解的长时间行为提供了新工具，扩展了Bourgain方法的适用范围，在随机PDE理论中有重要应用价值

title: Fully sign-changing Nehari constraint vs sign-changing solutions of a competitive Schrödinger system
summary: We study a competitive nonlinear Schrödinger system in $\mathbb{R}^N$ whose nonlinear potential is localized in small regions that shrink to isolated points. Within a variational framework based on a fully sign-changing Nehari constraint and Krasnosel'skii genus, we construct, for all $\varepsilon>0$, a sequence of sign-changing solutions with increasing and unbounded energies, and after suitable translations they converge to a sequence of sign-changing solutions of the associated limiting system as $\varepsilon\to 0$ in $H^1$-norm. Moreover, these sign-changing solutions concentrate around the prescribed attraction points both in $H^1$-norm and $L^q$-norm for $q\in [1,\infty]$.

AI.tldr: 研究竞争非线性薛定谔系统在局部化势能收缩到孤立点时的无穷多变号解的存在性和集中性
AI.motivation: 研究具有局部化非线性势的竞争非线性薛定谔系统，其中势能区域收缩到孤立点，探索此类系统中变号解的存在性、多重性和集中行为
AI.techniques: 基于完全变号Nehari约束和Krasnosel'skii亏格的变分框架，构造能量递增无界的变号解序列，分析解的收敛性和集中性
AI.main_theorems: 对所有ε>0构造变号解序列，能量递增无界；当ε→0时，经适当平移后解在H¹范数下收敛到极限系统的变号解；解在H¹和L^q范数下集中于指定吸引点
AI.significance: 为局部化竞争薛定谔系统提供了变号解的多重性理论，揭示了势能区域收缩时解的集中现象，发展了处理变号约束的变分方法

title: Nonlinear Schrödinger equations with a critical, inverse-square potential
summary: We study the existence of solutions of the following nonlinear Schrödinger equation $$ -Δu+V(x)u-\frac{(N-2)^2}{4|x|^2}u=f(x,u) $$ where $V:\mathbb{R}^N\to\mathbb{R}$ and $f:\mathbb{R}^N\times \mathbb{R}\to \mathbb{R}$ are periodic with respect to $x\in\mathbb{R}^N.$ We assume that $V$ has positive essential infimum, $f$ satisfies weak growth conditions and $N\geq 3$. The approach to the problem uses variational methods with nonstandard functional setting. We obtain the existence of the ground state solution using the new profile decomposition.

AI.tldr: 研究带Hardy势和周期位势的非线性薛定谔方程基态解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有Hardy势项和周期位势的非线性薛定谔方程，这类方程在量子力学和数学物理中具有重要意义，特别关注周期位势和奇异势的相互作用
AI.techniques: 变分方法结合非标准函数空间设置，使用新的轮廓分解技术处理Hardy势的奇异性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在周期位势和弱增长条件下，带Hardy势的非线性薛定谔方程基态解的存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了带奇异势的薛定谔方程理论，为处理周期位势和Hardy势的相互作用提供了新的数学工具，在量子力学和数学物理中有重要应用

title: Well-posedness and stability of the self-similar profile for a thin-film equation with gravity
summary:
We consider the thin-film equation with linear mobility and a stabilizing second-order porous-medium type term modeling gravity. The model admits self-similar solutions, and our goal is to analyze their stability. We reformulate the problem in mass-Lagrangian coordinates and exploit the underlying gradient-flow structure of the equation with respect to a weighted $L^2$ inner product, where the weight is given by the self-similar source-type profile. This framework allows us to establish a coercivity result for the Hessian (the linearization around the self-similar solution) in a suitably weighted inner product. As a consequence, we prove the convergence of perturbations toward the self-similar profile at an algebraic rate of order $t^{-\frac 1 5}$, in arbitrary scales of weighted Sobolev norms. The analysis relies on maximal-regularity estimates for the linearized evolution, combined with appropriate estimates for the nonlinear terms.
  Notably, beyond perturbative regimes and in contrast to previous results for the thin-film equation (convergence to the Smyth-Hill profile) or the porous-medium equation (convergence to the Barenblatt-Pattle solution), our analysis does not rely on an explicit (algebraic) representation of the self-similar profile. Instead, it is based solely on a systematic use of the ordinary differential equation satisfied by the self-similar solution, together with a careful analysis of its boundary asymptotics. As a result, we expect that the approach developed here can serve as a flexible toolbox for the study of more general classes of equations and for the stability analysis of special solutions in future work.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有线性迁移率和稳定二阶多孔介质项的薄膜方程自相似解的代数收敛稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究薄膜方程（具有线性迁移率和重力建模的稳定二阶多孔介质项）自相似解的稳定性问题，该模型在质量拉格朗日坐标下具有梯度流结构
AI.techniques: 质量拉格朗日坐标变换，梯度流结构分析，加权L^2内积框架，Hessian算子的强制性分析，最大正则性估计，非线性项估计，自相似解ODE系统分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了自相似解的稳定性：扰动以代数速率t^{-1/5}收敛到自相似剖面，在任意加权的Sobolev范数尺度下成立；建立了线性化算子在加权内积下的强制性结果
AI.significance: 提供了一种不依赖于自相似解显式代数表示的稳定性分析方法，该方法基于ODE系统和边界渐近分析，可推广到更广泛的方程类和特殊解的稳定性研究

title: Symmetry properties for positive solutions of mixed boundary value problems in a sub-spherical sector
summary: In this paper, we investigate the symmetry properties of positive solutions $u$ to a semilinear elliptic equation under mixed Dirichlet-Neumann boundary conditions in symmetric domains. First, we establish a maximum principle tailored to mixed-boundary problems in domains of either small volume or narrow width, thereby enabling the application of the moving plane method. Secondly, in contrast to the purely Dirichlet case, a key challenge is to establish the non-vanishing of the tangential derivative of $u$ along the Neumann boundary. To address this, we employ local analysis techniques of angular derivatives, as introduced by Hartman and Wintner [Amer. J. Math., 1953]. Thirdly, we identify the signs of directional derivatives of $u$ along sections of the moving line. Using a planar sub-spherical sector as an example, we illustrate how these new innovative techniques and the moving plane method can be combined to derive symmetry and monotonicity results, particularly when the amplitude is less than or equal to $2π/3$.

AI.tldr: 针对混合Dirichlet-Neumann边界条件下的半线性椭圆方程正解，发展了适用于小体积或窄宽度区域的最大值原理，结合移动平面法和角导数局部分析技术，获得了对称性和单调性结果。
AI.motivation: 研究对称区域中混合Dirichlet-Neumann边界条件下半线性椭圆方程正解的对称性质。与纯Dirichlet情况不同，混合边界条件带来了新的挑战，特别是需要处理Neumann边界上解的切向导数非零性问题。
AI.techniques: 1) 针对小体积或窄宽度区域建立了混合边界问题的最大值原理；2) 应用移动平面法；3) 采用Hartman和Wintner引入的角导数局部分析技术处理Neumann边界上的切向导数；4) 确定沿移动线各段的方向导数符号。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了适用于混合边界问题在小体积或窄宽度区域的最大值原理；2) 证明了Neumann边界上解的切向导数非零性；3) 以平面亚球形扇区为例，当振幅≤2π/3时，获得了对称性和单调性结果。
AI.significance: 扩展了对称性结果到混合边界条件情形，发展了处理Neumann边界上切向导数的新技术，为更一般的边界条件问题提供了分析框架，对椭圆型偏微分方程的几何分析有重要贡献。

title: Hierarchical paraproducts
summary: We outline an extension of paraproduct decompositions for compositions of the form $A(f)$ where $A \in C^{d}(\mathbb{R}), f \in Λ_α([0,1]^d)$ developed in [arXiv:2503.12629] and [arXiv:2508.13322] to settings where $(A \in C^1(\mathbb{R}),f \in Λ_α(X))$ and $ (A \in C^2(\mathbb{R}),f \in Λ_α(X \times Y))$. To do so, we construct partition trees on $X$ and $X \times Y$ such that analysis with respect to scale is sensible. We obtain results resembling those of [arXiv:2503.12629] and [arXiv:2508.13322], but with the finite sets $X$ and $X \times Y $ as support. In particular we construct the paraproduct $Π_{A',A''}^{L,S}: f \to \tilde{A}_{L,S}(f) + Δ_{L,S}(A,f)$ such that $Δ_{L,S}(A,f) \in Λ_{2α}(X \times Y)$ and $\lVert Δ_{L,S}(A,f) \rVert_{Λ_{2α}(X \times Y)} \leq C_A \lVert f \rVert_{Λ_α(X \times Y)}$. Analogous results are obtained when the support is just one finite set, $X$. This extension is motivated by situations where one wishes to separate the singular and smooth components of such compositions in graph signal processing environments.

AI.tldr: 将抛物积分解从连续域扩展到有限集上的Hölder函数，为图信号处理中的奇异-光滑分量分离提供数学基础
AI.motivation: 将抛物积分解技术从连续域推广到有限集，特别是针对图信号处理中需要分离复合函数奇异与光滑分量的应用场景
AI.techniques: 构造有限集上的划分树，建立尺度分析框架，构建抛物积算子，控制高阶Hölder范数
AI.main_theorems: 在有限集X和X×Y上构造抛物积分解Π_{A',A''}^{L,S}，使得Δ_{L,S}(A,f) ∈ Λ_{2α}且其范数受f的Hölder范数控制
AI.significance: 为图信号处理中的非线性算子分析提供严格数学工具，将经典抛物积理论推广到离散/有限集情形
